title: Default Models
subtitle: Configure the AI models used for background tasks and automated features.
conversationTitleDesc: Used to generate a concise title after the first exchange in a new chat.
relatedQuestionsDesc: Used to suggest follow-up questions after an AI response.
contextCompressionDesc: Used to summarize long conversations when token limits are approached.
promptOptimizationDesc: Use AI to improve text content.
ragQueryDesc: Used to generate optimized search queries for the Knowledge Base.
memoryDesc: Used to extract, consolidate, and maintain long-term local memories.
